en: After this Jesus went about in Galilee. He would not go about in Judea, because the Jews were seeking to kill him.
zh: 這事以後，耶穌周遊加利利，不願在猶太往來，因為猶太人想要殺他。

en: Now the Jews' Feast of Booths was at hand.
zh: 猶太人的住棚節快到了，

en: So his brothers said to him, "Leave here and go to Judea, that your disciples also may see the works you are doing.
zh: 耶穌的弟弟就對他說：“你應當離開這裡上猶太去，好讓你的門徒也可以看見你所行的事；

en: For no one works in secret if he seeks to be known openly. If you do these things, show yourself to the world."
zh: 因為沒有人想引人注目，卻在暗處行事的。你既然行這些事，就應該向世人顯明自己。”

en: For not even his brothers believed in him.
zh: 原來連他的弟弟也不信他。

en: Jesus said to them, "My time has not yet come, but your time is always here.
zh: 耶穌就對他們說：“我的時候還沒有到，你們的時候卻常常是方便的。

en: The world cannot hate you, but it hates me because I testify about it that its works are evil.
zh: 世人不能恨你們，卻憎恨我，因為我指證他們的行為是邪惡的。

en: You go up to the feast. I am not going up to this feast, for my time has not yet fully come."
zh: 你們上去過節吧！我現在不上去過這個節，因為我的時機還沒有成熟。”

en: After saying this, he remained in Galilee.
zh: 他說了這些話以後，仍然住在加利利。

en: But after his brothers had gone up to the feast, then he also went up, not publicly but in private.
zh: 然而，他的弟弟上去過節以後，他也上去過節，不是公開地去，卻是暗中地去。

en: The Jews were looking for him at the feast, and saying, "Where is he?"
zh: 過節的時候，猶太人尋找耶穌，說：“那人在哪裡呢？”

en: And there was much muttering about him among the people. While some said, "He is a good man," others said, "No, he is leading the people astray."
zh: 群眾因他紛紛議論，有的說：“他是好人。”有的說：“不，他是欺騙眾人的。”

en: Yet for fear of the Jews no one spoke openly of him.
zh: 但沒有人敢公開講論他，因為怕猶太人。

en: About the middle of the feast Jesus went up into the temple and began teaching.
zh: 節期當中，耶穌上聖殿去教導人。

en: The Jews therefore marveled, saying, "How is it that this man has learning, when he has never studied?"
zh: 猶太人就希奇，說：“這個人沒有學過，怎會通曉經書呢？”

en: So Jesus answered them, "My teaching is not mine, but his who sent me.
zh: 耶穌說：“我的教訓不是我自己的，而是出於那差我來的。

en: If anyone's will is to do God's will, he will know whether the teaching is from God or whether I am speaking on my own authority.
zh: 人若願意遵行 神的旨意，就會知道這教訓是出於 神，還是我憑著自己的意思說的。

en: The one who speaks on his own authority seeks his own glory, but the one who seeks the glory of him who sent him is true, and in him there is no falsehood.
zh: 那憑著自己的意思說的，是求自己的榮譽；但那尋求差他來者的榮耀的，才是真誠的人，在他裡面沒有不義。

en: Has not Moses given you the law? Yet none of you keeps the law. Why do you seek to kill me?"
zh: 摩西不是曾經把律法傳給你們嗎？你們竟然沒有一個人遵行律法。你們為甚麼想要殺我呢？”

en: The crowd answered, "You have a demon! Who is seeking to kill you?"
zh: 群眾回答：“你是鬼附的，誰想要殺你呢？”

en: Jesus answered them, "I did one deed, and you all marvel at it.
zh: 耶穌說：“我行了一件事，你們都以為希奇。

en: Moses gave you circumcision (not that it is from Moses, but from the fathers), and you circumcise a man on the Sabbath.
zh: 摩西曾經把割禮傳給你們 ，因此，你們在安息日也給人行割禮。

en: If on the Sabbath a man receives circumcision, so that the law of Moses may not be broken, are you angry with me because on the Sabbath I made a man's whole body well?
zh: 如果人在安息日行割禮，為的是要遵守摩西的律法，那麼我在安息日使一個人全身健康，你們就向我生氣嗎？

en: Do not judge by appearances, but judge with right judgment."
zh: 不要按外貌判斷人，總要公公平平地判斷人。”

en: Some of the people of Jerusalem therefore said, "Is not this the man whom they seek to kill?
zh: 當時，有些耶路撒冷人說：“這不是他們想要殺的人嗎？

en: And here he is, speaking openly, and they say nothing to him! Can it be that the authorities really know that this is the Christ?
zh: 你看，他還在公開地講話，竟然沒有人對他說甚麼，難道官長們真的認為這個人就是基督嗎？

en: But we know where this man comes from, and when the Christ appears, no one will know where he comes from."
zh: 可是我們知道這個人是從哪裡來的，只是基督來的時候，沒有人知道他是從哪裡來的！”

en: So Jesus proclaimed, as he taught in the temple, "You know me, and you know where I come from? But I have not come of my own accord. He who sent me is true, and him you do not know.
zh: 當時耶穌在殿裡教導人，大聲說：“你們以為認識我，也知道我從哪裡來，其實我不是憑著自己的意思來的，但那差我來的是真實的，你們卻不認識他。

en: I know him, for I come from him, and he sent me."
zh: 然而我認識他，因為我從他那裡來，也是他差我來的。”

en: So they were seeking to arrest him, but no one laid a hand on him, because his hour had not yet come.
zh: 於是他們想逮捕他，只是沒有人下手，因為他的時候還沒有到。

en: Yet many of the people believed in him. They said, "When the Christ appears, will he do more signs than this man has done?"
zh: 群眾中有許多人信了他。他們說：“基督來的時候，他所行的神蹟，能比這人所行的更多嗎？”

en: The Pharisees heard the crowd muttering these things about him, and the chief priests and Pharisees sent officers to arrest him.
zh: 法利賽人聽見群眾紛紛議論這些關於耶穌的事，祭司長和法利賽人就派差役去逮捕耶穌。

en: Jesus then said, "I will be with you a little longer, and then I am going to him who sent me.
zh: 於是耶穌說：“我跟你們在一起的時候不多了，我要回到那差我來的那裡去。

en: You will seek me and you will not find me. Where I am you cannot come."
zh: 你們要尋找我，卻找不著；我所在的地方，你們是不能去的。”

en: The Jews said to one another, "Where does this man intend to go that we will not find him? Does he intend to go to the Dispersion among the Greeks and teach the Greeks?
zh: 猶太人彼此說：“這個人要到哪裡去，使我們找不著他呢？難道他要到散居在希臘人中的猶太人那裡，去教導希臘人嗎？

en: What does he mean by saying, 'You will seek me and you will not find me,' and, 'Where I am you cannot come'?"
zh: 他說‘你們要尋找我，卻找不著；我所在的地方，你們是不能去的’這話，是甚麼意思呢？”

en: On the last day of the feast, the great day, Jesus stood up and cried out, "If anyone thirsts, let him come to me and drink.
zh: 節期的最後一天，就是最隆重的那一天，耶穌站著高聲說：“人若渴了，可以到我這裡來喝！

en: Whoever believes in me, as the Scripture has said, 'Out of his heart will flow rivers of living water.'"
zh: 信我的人，就像聖經所說的，從他的腹中要湧流出活水的江河來。”

en: Now this he said about the Spirit, whom those who believed in him were to receive, for as yet the Spirit had not been given, because Jesus was not yet glorified.
zh: 他這話是指著信他的人要接受聖靈說的；那時聖靈還沒有降臨，因為耶穌還沒有得著榮耀。

en: When they heard these words, some of the people said, "This really is the Prophet."
zh: 群眾中有人聽了這些話，就說：“這真是‘那位先知’！”

en: Others said, "This is the Christ." But some said, "Is the Christ to come from Galilee?
zh: 另有人說：“他是基督。”還有人說：“基督是從加利利出來的嗎？

en: Has not the Scripture said that the Christ comes from the offspring of David, and comes from Bethlehem, the village where David was?"
zh: 聖經不是說基督是大衛的後裔，是從大衛本鄉伯利恆出來的嗎？”

en: So there was a division among the people over him.
zh: 群眾因為耶穌的緣故，就起了紛爭。

en: Some of them wanted to arrest him, but no one laid hands on him.
zh: 他們中間有人想逮捕耶穌，只是沒有人下手。

en: The officers then came to the chief priests and Pharisees, who said to them, "Why did you not bring him?"
zh: 差役回到祭司長和法利賽人那裡。他們就問差役：“你們為甚麼沒有把他帶來？”

en: The officers answered, "No one ever spoke like this man!"
zh: 差役回答：“從來沒有人像他這樣講話的！”

en: The Pharisees answered them, "Have you also been deceived?
zh: 法利賽人說：“連你們也受了欺騙嗎？

en: Have any of the authorities or the Pharisees believed in him?
zh: 官長或法利賽人中間有誰是信他的呢？

en: But this crowd that does not know the law is accursed."
zh: 至於這群不明白律法的人，他們是可咒詛的。”

en: Nicodemus, who had gone to him before, and who was one of them, said to them,
zh: 他們當中有一個人，就是以前來見耶穌的尼哥德慕，對他們說：

en: "Does our law judge a man without first giving him a hearing and learning what he does?"
zh: “如果不先聽取他本人的口供，查明他所作的事，我們的律法怎能把他定罪呢？”

en: They replied, "Are you from Galilee too? Search and see that no prophet arises from Galilee." [THE EARLIEST MANUSCRIPTS DO NOT INCLUDE JOHN 7:53-8:11]
zh: 他們回答：“你也是從加利利出來的嗎？你去考查一下，就知道先知是不會從加利利興起的。”

en: [[They went each to his own house,
zh: 於是各人都回家去了。
